instructions.source_of_truth: entries[].asset is the full manifest that will be written to each .game32.json sidecar.
workflow: Edit each entry.review.target_png if moving/renaming the PNG.
Edit each entry.asset directly. It contains the full game32.asset.v2 manifest.
Run corrections/apply or return to terminal and press Enter.

valid_actions.keep: Write edited entry.asset to the sidecar manifest. Do not move PNG.
valid_actions.move: Move/rename PNG to review.target_png, then write edited entry.asset to target manifest.
valid_actions.delete: Move PNG, manifest, and optionally import sidecar to trash directory.

compact_corrections.preferred: Use game32.review_corrections.v1 to edit only changed fields.

instructions.path_rule: review.target_png and asset.file.path may be res://, project-relative, or absolute. Project-relative is recommended.
